list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Add tools module and enhance project configuration
Introduced `starship-os_tools` module with scripts and JavaFX-based `ModuleSelector` application. Updated `pom.xml` with build properties, plugins, and dependencies; adjusted `.idea` configuration for multi-module setup and improved IDE integration. These changes streamline project management and module handling.

task.summary:
Update IDE configuration files for project setup
Removed outdated module references and added GitToolBox and Maven settings. These changes improve project configuration and enable better commit message validation and build management.

Update IDE configuration files for project setup
Removed outdated module references and added GitToolBox and Maven settings. These changes improve project configuration and enable better commit message validation and build management.

Update IDE configuration files for project setup
Removed outdated module references and added GitToolBox and Maven settings. These changes improve project configuration and enable better commit message validation and build management.

Remove .idea configuration files from version control
The `.idea` folder contains IDE-specific configuration files, which are not relevant to the project's source code and can vary between developers. Removing these files helps avoid unnecessary conflicts and keeps the repository clean.

Add Maven project structure for StarshipOS modules
Initialize a multi-module Maven project for StarshipOS with individual `pom.xml` files for each module and a parent POM file. This configuration streamlines build management and establishes the project's modular structure. Additionally, update `.idea` files for improved IDE configuration and version control handling.

Add Maven project structure for StarshipOS modules
Initialize a multi-module Maven project for StarshipOS with individual `pom.xml` files for each module and a parent POM file. This configuration streamlines build management and establishes the project's modular structure. Additionally, update `.idea` files for improved IDE configuration and version control handling.

Update workspace.xml and local tasks for project setup
Streamline `.idea` workspace configuration by removing outdated module references and updating local tasks. These changes improve IDE settings, enhance project organization, and support the new multi-module Maven project structure.

Add tools module and enhance project configuration
Introduced `starship-os_tools` module with scripts and JavaFX-based `ModuleSelector` application. Updated `pom.xml` with build properties, plugins, and dependencies; adjusted `.idea` configuration for multi-module setup and improved IDE integration. These changes streamline project management and module handling.

Add tools module and enhance project configuration
Introduced `starship-os_tools` module with scripts and JavaFX-based `ModuleSelector` application. Updated `pom.xml` with build properties, plugins, and dependencies; adjusted `.idea` configuration for multi-module setup and improved IDE integration. These changes streamline project management and module handling.

MESSAGE.value:
Update IDE configuration files for project setup
Removed outdated module references and added GitToolBox and Maven settings. These changes improve project configuration and enable better commit message validation and build management.

Remove .idea configuration files from version control
The `.idea` folder contains IDE-specific configuration files, which are not relevant to the project's source code and can vary between developers. Removing these files helps avoid unnecessary conflicts and keeps the repository clean.

Add Maven project structure for StarshipOS modules
Initialize a multi-module Maven project for StarshipOS with individual `pom.xml` files for each module and a parent POM file. This configuration streamlines build management and establishes the project's modular structure. Additionally, update `.idea` files for improved IDE configuration and version control handling.

Update workspace.xml and local tasks for project setup
Streamline `.idea` workspace configuration by removing outdated module references and updating local tasks. These changes improve IDE settings, enhance project organization, and support the new multi-module Maven project structure.

Add tools module and enhance project configuration
Introduced `starship-os_tools` module with scripts and JavaFX-based `ModuleSelector` application. Updated `pom.xml` with build properties, plugins, and dependencies; adjusted `.idea` configuration for multi-module setup and improved IDE integration. These changes streamline project management and module handling.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Add tools module and enhance project configuration
Introduced `starship-os_tools` module with scripts and JavaFX-based `ModuleSelector` application. Updated `pom.xml` with build properties, plugins, and dependencies; adjusted `.idea` configuration for multi-module setup and improved IDE integration. These changes streamline project management and module handling.
